lines.text: Store 3135 Dir Tomas de la Cruz

lines.issue: address line truncated — real reads '2725 Asoura Road'; street number and 'Road' are missing, leaving a lone centered word
state 'CA' dropped between city and ZIP, leaving an oversized gap mid-line
'PRODUCE' header rendered in a lighter/smaller weight than the real, weaker than the column headers to its right
two conflicting amounts on one item line — Price column shows 2.09 (light orange) while You Pay shows 1.49; real has 1.49 in both columns
added item implausible — a 'LIQUOR 12 PACK' priced at 0.60 is not a believable line; item code 9612 too short vs the 10-digit produce code above
savings of -6.00 exceeds the item's 0.60 price, an impossible discount; breaks subtotal arithmetic
'TAX' label over-indented, not left-aligned to the PRODUCE column like the real
BALANCE 2.09 doesn't reconcile with 1.49+0.60 minus a 6.00 savings; amount in lighter weight
'PAYMENT AMOUNT' rendered in a faint small-caps weight far lighter than the real bold line; amount 2.09 in light orange
'Mastercard' and its 2.09 amount rendered in a tiny light weight, inconsistent with the bold CHANGE line directly below

lines.text: To sign up for more savings,
r For VONS FOR U questions call

worst_lines: line 9: ORGANIC CILANTRO shows two conflicting prices (2.09 vs 1.49)
line 11: Member Savings -6.00 exceeds the 0.60 item price, impossible discount
line 4: address collapsed to lone 'Asoura', missing street number and 'Road'
line 17: PAYMENT AMOUNT in faint small-caps weight unlike the rest
line 13: BALANCE 2.09 fails to reconcile with item totals and savings
summary: The synthetic captures Vons' overall layout but the add-item candidate breaks arithmetic (double/inconsistent prices, an impossible -6.00 savings on a 0.60 item) and shows a truncated address and several faint, inconsistent font-weight amounts that a skeptic would immediately flag.
